summary.intent: Fix and resolve a PR review comment on the MiniMax provider implementation in the moltis repository.
summary.outcome: Added a warning log for non-string MiniMax system message content (array/object) to prevent silent data drops; committed and pushed the fix to resolve the PR comment.

repo: MiniMax provider is implemented in crates/providers/src/openai.rs, sharing the OpenAI provider file.
PR review uses Greptile for automated code review comments.

code.finding: MiniMax system message handling silently drops non-string content (arrays/objects); a warning log was added to surface this behavior.

workflow: Clippy and minimax-specific tests were run before committing to verify the fix.
PR comments were fetched via Bash/GitHub CLI to identify what needed fixing.
